channel.title: Money Minute Daily
channel.description: Your free daily 5-minute finance podcast. Stock market, investing, personal finance, and economic news every morning. The smartest 5 minutes for your money.
channel.itunes:author: Money Minute Daily

item.title: Money News Jun 29 — Risks in Focus After US Stocks’ Wild Start to
item.description: The first half of 2026 has been nothing short of a wild ride for US stocks, and as we head into the second half of the year, investors are facing a daunting list of risks that could make or break their portfolios. From the rising tide of interest rates to the looming US elections and the unpredictable impact of artificial intelligence, it's a complex web of challenges that's keeping even the most seasoned investors on their toes. The fact that the Federal Reserve is likely to continue raising in...

item.title: Money News Jun 29 — PBOC’s New Overnight Rate Said Below Forecast
item.description: China's central bank just made a surprise move that could have major implications for the global economy, setting the interest rate on its new overnight liquidity tool lower than expected, effectively giving the market a de facto rate cut. This means that market borrowing costs could be pushed down, and some economists are interpreting this as a sign that China is looking to ease its monetary policy. Why does this matter? Well, a rate cut, or in this case, a de facto rate cut, can have a ripple ...

item.title: Money News Jun 30 — Quant funds just suffered their most cripplin
item.description: Quant funds are reeling after their worst trading rout of the year, with momentum stocks taking a beating in the last week, but before you hit the panic button, it's essential to take a step back and look at the bigger picture. Although the recent slump has been painful for quant funds, asset allocators are reminding investors that it's crucial to assess returns over a wider timeframe, and so far in 2026, the sector is still significantly ahead of the S&P 500 and U.S. Treasurys. This is why it m...

item.title: Money Minute Daily | Jun 30 — BlackRock Downgrades Emerging-Market Equities Over
item.description: Emerging markets, once the darling of investors, are taking a backseat as one of the world's largest asset managers sounds the alarm on AI risks. BlackRock Inc.'s research arm has become cautious on emerging-market stocks, and it's a significant shift in sentiment that matters to investors worldwide. The reason for this caution is the rapidly evolving landscape of artificial intelligence and its potential to disrupt traditional industries and economies. As AI continues to advance, the dynamics o...

item.title: Money Minute Daily | Jun 30 — Brazil Real Becomes ‘Collateral Damage’ as Dollar
item.description: The dollar is back and it's taking no prisoners, with the Brazilian real just becoming the latest casualty in its resurgence, recording its worst month this year as investors scramble to unwind their carry trades. This matters because it's a stark reminder of just how quickly sentiment can shift in the markets, and how even the most favored trades can become yesterday's news in the blink of an eye. The Brazilian real had been one of the darlings of emerging market currencies, but with the dollar...
